title: Google Health brings a powerful new widget to your home screen
summary: Google Health’s new widget packs up to six fitness stats right on your home screen.
body: Credit: Google TL;DR Google Health introduces a new stats widget. The widget can fit up to six fitness metrics at a time. Tapping the heart icon in the top left corner will open the app. As Google announced earlier this month, the Fitbit app is being transformed into the Google Health app . In addition to delivering a redesign, this update is also introducing a number of changes. But the app isn’t the only thing new, its corresponding widget is new too. Don’t want to miss the best from Android Authority ?

title: Google Health 5.0 rolling out with new stats widget on Android
summary: As telegraphed, Google Health is now rolling out as an update to the Fitbit app. On Android, Google Health 5.0 introduces a new homescreen Quick Access Widget. more…

title: Fitbit 4.69 rolls out with redesign of focus stats and logging
summary: Google has rolled out version 4.69 of Fitbit for Android as the last update before the Google Health rebrand. more…
